title: Midnight Lamb Chops
description: A simple yet flavorful lamb chop recipe, perfect for a weeknight dinner. The midnight seasoning blend adds a unique twist to traditional lamb.
instructions: Season the lamb chops with salt, black pepper, and midnight seasoning blend.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb chops for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 8-12 minutes, or until the lamb reaches your desired level of doneness.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with lemon and orange zest.
Let the lamb rest for 5 minutes before serving.
